exam_price_notes: Exam-only fee $299. With study materials bundle $499. CPR/AED certification required.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers worldwide
Online proctored via Proctorio; requires webcam, microphone, and stable internet

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID. Name must match NASM registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. No personal items in testing area. CPR/AED certification required for CPT credential (not for specialty certs).
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 2 years. Renewal requires 2.0 CECs (Continuing Education Credits) and an active CPR/AED certification (for CPT). Credits earned through NASM-approved continuing education courses and professional development activities.

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period between exam attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

domains.name: Basic and Applied Sciences and Nutritional Concepts

official_study_resources.title: NASM Study Materials and Exam Prep
official_study_resources.notes: Official textbooks, study guides, practice exams, and bundle packages
